query: image of finite set has cardinality at most original

context.enclosing_signature: (f : G вҶ’ G') (K : в„қ) (hK : K > 0) (hf : Nat.card G ^ 2 / K вүӨ Nat.card {x : G Г— G | f (x.1 + x.2) = f x.1 + f x.2}) : вҲғ (ПҶ : G вҶ’+ G') (c : G'), Nat.card {x | f x = ПҶ x + c} вүҘ Nat.card G / (2 ^ 144 * K ^ 122)
context.goal: вҠў Nat.card вҶ‘(Prod.fst '' c) вүӨ Nat.card вҶ‘c
hypotheses: this : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘(A'' + A'')) вүӨ 2 ^ 14 * K ^ 12 * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A'')
hc_card : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘c) вүӨ (2 ^ 14 * K ^ 12) ^ 5 * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A'') ^ (1 / 2) * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) ^ (-1 / 2)
hHвӮҖHвӮҒ : вҲҖ (x : G Г— G'), x вҲҲ H вҶ” x.1 вҲҲ HвӮҖ вҲ§ x.2 - ПҶ x.1 вҲҲ HвӮҒ
hHвӮҖHвӮҒ_card : Nat.card вҶҘH = Nat.card вҶҘHвӮҖ * Nat.card вҶҘHвӮҒ
h_le : Nat.card вҶ‘A'' вүӨ Nat.card вҶ‘(Prod.fst '' c + вҶ‘HвӮҖ)
h_proj_A'' : Nat.card вҶ‘A'' = Nat.card вҶ‘(Prod.fst '' A'')
h_proj_c : Prod.fst '' (c + вҶ‘H) = Prod.fst '' c + вҶ‘HвӮҖ
prior_tactics:
have h_proj_A'' : Nat.card A'' = Nat.card (Prod.fst '' A'') := Nat.card_congr
  (Equiv.Set.imageOfInjOn Prod.fst A'' <|
    Set.fst_injOn_graph.mono (Set.Finite.subset_toFinset.mp hA'))

have h_proj_c : Prod.fst '' (c + H : Set (G Г— G')) = (Prod.fst '' c) + HвӮҖ := by
  ext x ; constructor <;> intro hx
  В· obtain вҹЁx, вҹЁвҹЁc, hc, h, hh, hchвҹ©, hxвҹ©вҹ© := hx
    rewrite [вҶҗ hx]
    exact вҹЁc.1, Set.mem_image_of_mem Prod.fst hc, h.1, ((hHвӮҖHвӮҒ h).mp hh).1, (Prod.ext_iff.mp hch).1вҹ©
  В· obtain вҹЁ_, вҹЁc, hcвҹ©, h, hh, hchвҹ© := hx
    refine вҹЁc + (h, ПҶ h), вҹЁвҹЁc, hc.1, (h, ПҶ h), ?_вҹ©, by rwa [вҶҗ hc.2] at hchвҹ©вҹ©
    exact вҹЁ(hHвӮҖHвӮҒ вҹЁh, ПҶ hвҹ©).mpr вҹЁhh, by rw [sub_self]; apply zero_memвҹ©, rflвҹ©

context.goal: вҠў вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) * (1 / вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘHвӮҖ)) вүӨ вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) * (вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘c) / вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A''))
hypotheses: this : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘(A'' + A'')) вүӨ 2 ^ 14 * K ^ 12 * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A'')
hc_card : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘c) вүӨ (2 ^ 14 * K ^ 12) ^ 5 * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A'') ^ (1 / 2) * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) ^ (-1 / 2)
hHвӮҖHвӮҒ : вҲҖ (x : G Г— G'), x вҲҲ H вҶ” x.1 вҲҲ HвӮҖ вҲ§ x.2 - ПҶ x.1 вҲҲ HвӮҒ
hHвӮҖHвӮҒ_card : Nat.card вҶҘH = Nat.card вҶҘHвӮҖ * Nat.card вҶҘHвӮҒ
h_le_HвӮҖ : Nat.card вҶ‘A'' вүӨ Nat.card вҶ‘c * Nat.card вҶҘHвӮҖ

context.enclosing_signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure (в„ҷ : Measure О©)] [Module (ZMod 2) G] : c[U|S # U|S] + c[V|S # V|S] + c[W|S # W|S] вүӨ (6 - 3 * p.О·)*k + 3 * (2*p.О·*k - IвӮҒ)
context.goal: вҠў d[XвӮҖвӮӮ # XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ | XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ + (XвӮҒ' + XвӮӮ')] - d[XвӮҖвӮӮ # XвӮӮ] вүӨ (H[XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ + (XвӮҒ' + XвӮӮ')] + H[XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ] - H[XвӮӮ] - H[XвӮҒ' + XвӮӮ']) / 2
hypotheses: XвӮҒ XвӮӮ XвӮҒ' XвӮӮ' : О© вҶ’ G
hвӮҒ : IdentDistrib XвӮҒ XвӮҒ' в„ҷ в„ҷ
hвӮӮ : IdentDistrib XвӮӮ XвӮӮ' в„ҷ в„ҷ
h_indep : iIndepFun ![XвӮҒ, XвӮӮ, XвӮҒ', XвӮӮ'] в„ҷ
ineq1 : d[XвӮҖвӮҒ # U | S] - d[XвӮҖвӮҒ # XвӮҒ] вүӨ (H[S] - H[XвӮҒ]) / 2
aux1 : H[S] + H[U] - H[XвӮӮ] - H[XвӮҒ' + XвӮӮ'] = H[S] - H[XвӮӮ]
prior_tactics: rw [hU XвӮҒ XвӮӮ XвӮҒ' XвӮӮ' hвӮҒ hвӮӮ h_indep]
rw [(show U = XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ from add_comm _ _)]

query: conditional Ruzsa distance change when adding a sum bounded by entropies

context.enclosing_signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure (в„ҷ : Measure О©)] [Module (ZMod 2) G] : c[U|S # U|S] + c[V|S # V|S] + c[W|S # W|S] вүӨ (6 - 3 * p.О·)*k + 3 * (2*p.О·*k - IвӮҒ)
context.goal: вҠў d[p.XвӮҖвӮӮ # XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ' | XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ' + (XвӮҒ + XвӮӮ')] - d[p.XвӮҖвӮӮ # XвӮӮ] вүӨ (H[XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ' + (XвӮҒ + XвӮӮ')] + H[XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ'] - H[XвӮӮ] - H[XвӮҒ + XвӮӮ']) / 2
hypotheses: XвӮҒ XвӮӮ XвӮҒ' XвӮӮ' : О© вҶ’ G
hвӮҒ : IdentDistrib XвӮҒ XвӮҒ' в„ҷ в„ҷ
hвӮӮ : IdentDistrib XвӮӮ XвӮӮ' в„ҷ в„ҷ
h_indep : iIndepFun ![XвӮҒ, XвӮӮ, XвӮҒ', XвӮӮ'] в„ҷ
ineq1 : d[XвӮҖвӮҒ # U | S] - d[XвӮҖвӮҒ # XвӮҒ] вүӨ (H[S] - H[XвӮҒ]) / 2
ineq2 : d[XвӮҖвӮӮ # U | S] - d[XвӮҖвӮӮ # XвӮӮ] вүӨ (H[S] - H[XвӮӮ]) / 2
ineq3 : d[XвӮҖвӮҒ # V | S] - d[XвӮҖвӮҒ # XвӮҒ] вүӨ (H[S] - H[XвӮҒ]) / 2
prior_tactics:
have aux2 : d[p.XвӮҖвӮӮ # V | V + (XвӮҒ + XвӮӮ')] - d[p.XвӮҖвӮӮ # XвӮӮ]
        вүӨ (H[V + (XвӮҒ + XвӮӮ')] + H[V] - H[XвӮӮ] - H[XвӮҒ + XвӮӮ']) / 2 := by
  rw [(show V = XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ' from add_comm _ _)]
  apply condRuzsaDist_diff_ofsum_le в„ҷ (p.hmeas2) (hXвӮӮ) (hXвӮҒ') (Measurable.add hXвӮҒ hXвӮӮ')
    (independenceCondition4 hXвӮҒ hXвӮӮ hXвӮҒ' hXвӮӮ' h_indep)

have aux1 : H[S] + H[V] - H[XвӮӮ] - H[XвӮҒ + XвӮӮ'] = H[S ; в„ҷ] - H[XвӮӮ ; в„ҷ] := by
  rw [hV XвӮҒ XвӮӮ XвӮҒ' XвӮӮ' hвӮҒ hвӮӮ h_indep]; ring
rw [(show V = XвӮӮ + XвӮҒ' from add_comm _ _)]

context.enclosing_signature: : k вүӨ Оҙ + p.О· * c[TвӮҒ # TвӮӮ] + p.О· * (I[TвӮҒ: TвӮғ] + I[TвӮӮ : TвӮғ])/2

hypotheses: TвӮҒ TвӮӮ TвӮғ : О©' вҶ’ G
sum1 : в„қ := вҲ« (x : G), (fun t => d[TвӮҒ ; в„ҷ[|TвӮғ вҒ»В№' {t}] # TвӮӮ ; в„ҷ[|TвӮғ вҒ»В№' {t}]]) x вҲӮMeasure.map TвӮғ в„ҷ
sum2 : в„қ := вҲ« (x : G), (fun t => d[p.XвӮҖвӮҒ ; в„ҷ # TвӮҒ ; в„ҷ[|TвӮғ вҒ»В№' {t}]] - d[p.XвӮҖвӮҒ # XвӮҒ]) x вҲӮMeasure.map TвӮғ в„ҷ
sum3 : в„қ := вҲ« (x : G), (fun t => d[p.XвӮҖвӮӮ ; в„ҷ # TвӮӮ ; в„ҷ[|TвӮғ вҒ»В№' {t}]] - d[p.XвӮҖвӮӮ # XвӮӮ]) x вҲӮMeasure.map TвӮғ в„ҷ
sum4 : в„қ := вҲ« (x : G), (fun t => ПҲ[TвӮҒ; в„ҷ[|TвӮғ вҒ»В№' {t}] # TвӮӮ ; в„ҷ[|TвӮғ вҒ»В№' {t}]]) x вҲӮMeasure.map TвӮғ в„ҷ
h2 : p.О· * sum2 вүӨ p.О· * (d[p.XвӮҖвӮҒ # TвӮҒ] - d[p.XвӮҖвӮҒ # XвӮҒ] + I[TвӮҒ : TвӮғ] / 2)
h3 : p.О· * sum3 вүӨ p.О· * (d[p.XвӮҖвӮӮ # TвӮӮ] - d[p.XвӮҖвӮӮ # XвӮӮ] + I[TвӮӮ : TвӮғ] / 2)
h4 : sum4 вүӨ Оҙ + p.О· * c[TвӮҒ # TвӮӮ] + p.О· * (I[TвӮҒ : TвӮғ] + I[TвӮӮ : TвӮғ]) / 2

  map_measureReal_apply hTвӮғ (.singleton _)]
suffices sum4 = sum1 + p.О· * (sum2 + sum3) by linarith

suffices (Measure.map TвӮғ в„ҷ)[fun _ вҶҰ k] вүӨ sum4 by simpa using this

context.enclosing_signature: (X : О© вҶ’ Оұ) (Y : О© вҶ’ ОІ) (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) [finY : FiniteRange Y] (Ој : Measure О©) [IsProbabilityMeasure Ој] : вҲғ (О©' : Type u) (_ : MeasurableSpace О©') (XвӮҒ XвӮӮ : О©' вҶ’ Оұ) (Y' : О©' вҶ’ ОІ) (ОҪ : Measure О©'), IsProbabilityMeasure ОҪ вҲ§ Measurable XвӮҒ вҲ§ Measurable XвӮӮ вҲ§ Measurable Y' вҲ§ CondIndepFun XвӮҒ XвӮӮ Y' ОҪ вҲ§ IdentDistrib (вҹЁXвӮҒ, Y'вҹ©) (вҹЁX, Yвҹ©) ОҪ Ој вҲ§ IdentDistrib (вҹЁXвӮӮ, Y'вҹ©) (вҹЁX, Yвҹ©) ОҪ Ој
context.goal: вҠў AEMeasurable (fun Пү => Пү.1.1) (m y)
hypotheses: m' : ОІ вҶ’ Measure Оұ := fun y => map X Ој[|Y вҒ»В№' {y}]
m : ОІ вҶ’ Measure ((Оұ Г— Оұ) Г— ОІ) := fun y => ((m' y).prod (m' y)).prod (dirac y)
ОҪ : Measure ((Оұ Г— Оұ) Г— ОІ) := вҲ‘ y вҲҲ FiniteRange.toFinset Y, Ој (Y вҒ»В№' {y}) вҖў m y
h3' : вҲҖ (y : ОІ), {Пү | Y Пү = y} вҲҲ ae Ој[|Y вҒ»В№' {y}]
h3 : вҲҖ (y : ОІ), IdentDistrib (fun Пү => (X Пү, y)) (вҹЁX, Yвҹ©) Ој[|Y вҒ»В№' {y}] Ој[|Y вҒ»В№' {y}]

prior_tactics:
have hy'' : Ој (Y вҒ»В№' {y}) вү  0 := by
  convert hy
  exact (map_apply hY .of_discrete).symm

have h2 : ОҪ[| Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}] = m y := by
  rw [Measure.ext_iff]
  intro E _
  rw [cond_apply (measurable_snd (by simp)), hy']
  have h3 : (m y) ((Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}) вҲ© E) = (m y) E := by
    apply measure_congr
    apply inter_ae_eq_right_of_ae_eq_univ
    simp only [ae_eq_univ]
    rw [(show (Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y})б¶ң = Prod.sndвҒ»В№' ({y}б¶ң) by rfl), вҶҗ map_apply measurable_snd (by simp)]
    simp [m]
  have h3' {x : ОІ} (hx : x вү  y) : (m x) ((Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}) вҲ© E) = 0 := by
    apply measure_inter_null_of_null_left E
    rw [вҶҗ Measure.map_apply measurable_snd (by simp), MeasureTheory.Measure.map_snd_prod]
    simp only [smul_apply, MeasurableSet.singleton, dirac_apply', smul_eq_mul, mul_eq_zero,
      indicator_apply_eq_zero, Pi.one_apply,
      one_ne_zero, imp_false]; right; exact hx
  simp only [coe_finset_sum, coe_smul, Finset.sum_apply, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, ОҪ]
  rw [Finset.sum_eq_single_of_mem y ?_]
  В· rw [h3, вҶҗ mul_assoc, ENNReal.inv_mul_cancel hy'', one_mul]
    finiteness
  В· intro _ _ hx
    rw [h3' hx]
    simp
  В· convert FiniteRange.range Y в–ё Set.preimage_singleton_nonempty.mp (nonempty_of_measure_ne_zero hy'')

В· let f : (Оұ Г— Оұ) Г— ОІ вҶ’ Оұ Г— Оұ := Prod.fst
  show ((m y).map f) = ((m y).map (Prod.fst вҲҳ f)).prod ((m y).map (Prod.snd вҲҳ f))
  have : IsProbabilityMeasure (m' y) := h5 hy''
  have : (m y).map f = (m' y).prod (m' y) := by simp [f, m]
  rw [вҶҗ map_map measurable_fst measurable_fst, вҶҗ map_map measurable_snd measurable_fst, this]
  simp

context.enclosing_signature: (X : О© вҶ’ Оұ) (Y : О© вҶ’ ОІ) (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) [finY : FiniteRange Y] (Ој : Measure О©) [IsProbabilityMeasure Ој] : вҲғ (О©' : Type u) (_ : MeasurableSpace О©') (XвӮҒ XвӮӮ : О©' вҶ’ Оұ) (Y' : О©' вҶ’ ОІ) (ОҪ : Measure О©'), IsProbabilityMeasure ОҪ вҲ§ Measurable XвӮҒ вҲ§ Measurable XвӮӮ вҲ§ Measurable Y' вҲ§ CondIndepFun XвӮҒ XвӮӮ Y' ОҪ вҲ§ IdentDistrib (вҹЁXвӮҒ, Y'вҹ©) (вҹЁX, Yвҹ©) ОҪ Ој вҲ§ IdentDistrib (вҹЁXвӮӮ, Y'вҹ©) (вҹЁX, Yвҹ©) ОҪ Ој

prior_tactics:
refine вҹЁ(Оұ Г— Оұ) Г— ОІ, by infer_instance, fun Пү вҶҰ Пү.1.1, fun Пү вҶҰ Пү.1.2, fun Пү вҶҰ Пү.2, ОҪ, ?_,
  measurable_fst.comp measurable_fst, measurable_snd.comp measurable_fst,

В· constructor
  simp only [coe_finset_sum, smul_toOuterMeasure, OuterMeasure.coe_smul, Finset.sum_apply,
    Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, ОҪ]
  have : вҲ‘ y вҲҲ finY.toFinset, Ој (Y вҒ»В№' {y}) * 1 = 1 := by
    simp only [mul_one]
    rw [sum_measure_preimage_singleton]
    В· rw [вҶҗ FiniteRange.range Y, preimage_range, measure_univ]
    В· exact fun y _ вҶҰ hY <| .singleton y
  rw [вҶҗ this]
  congr with y
  rcases eq_or_ne (Ој (Y вҒ»В№' {y})) 0 with hy | hy
  В· simp [hy]
  have : IsProbabilityMeasure (m' y) := h5 hy
  simp

В· rw [condIndepFun_iff, ae_iff_of_countable]
  intro y hy
  have hy' : ОҪ (Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}) = Ој (Y вҒ»В№' {y}) := by
    rw [вҶҗ map_apply measurable_snd (by simp), вҶҗ map_apply hY $ .singleton y, h1]
  rw [h1] at hy
  have hy'' : Ој (Y вҒ»В№' {y}) вү  0 := by
    convert hy
    exact (map_apply hY .of_discrete).symm
  have h2 : ОҪ[| Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}] = m y := by
    rw [Measure.ext_iff]
    intro E _
    rw [cond_apply (measurable_snd (by simp)), hy']
    have h3 : (m y) ((Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}) вҲ© E) = (m y) E := by
      apply measure_congr
      apply inter_ae_eq_right_of_ae_eq_univ
      simp only [ae_eq_univ]
      rw [(show (Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y})б¶ң = Prod.sndвҒ»В№' ({y}б¶ң) by rfl), вҶҗ map_apply measurable_snd (by simp)]
      simp [m]
    have h3' {x : ОІ} (hx : x вү  y) : (m x) ((Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}) вҲ© E) = 0 := by
      apply measure_inter_null_of_null_left E
      rw [вҶҗ Measure.map_apply measurable_snd (by simp), MeasureTheory.Measure.map_snd_prod]
      simp only [smul_apply, MeasurableSet.singleton, dirac_apply', smul_eq_mul, mul_eq_zero,
        indicator_apply_eq_zero, Pi.one_apply,
        one_ne_zero, imp_false]; right; exact hx
    simp only [coe_finset_sum, coe_smul, Finset.sum_apply, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, ОҪ]
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_single_of_mem y ?_]
    В· rw [h3, вҶҗ mul_assoc, ENNReal.inv_mul_cancel hy'', one_mul]
      finiteness
    В· intro _ _ hx
      rw [h3' hx]
      simp
    В· convert FiniteRange.range Y в–ё Set.preimage_singleton_nonempty.mp (nonempty_of_measure_ne_zero hy'')
  rw [h2, indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map]
  В· let f : (Оұ Г— Оұ) Г— ОІ вҶ’ Оұ Г— Оұ := Prod.fst

  exact (measurable_snd.comp measurable_fst).aemeasurable

prior_tactics:
have hy'' : Ој (Y вҒ»В№' {y}) вү  0 := by
  convert hy
  exact (map_apply hY .of_discrete).symm

have h2 : ОҪ[| Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}] = m y := by
  rw [Measure.ext_iff]
  intro E _
  rw [cond_apply (measurable_snd (by simp)), hy']
  have h3 : (m y) ((Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}) вҲ© E) = (m y) E := by
    apply measure_congr
    apply inter_ae_eq_right_of_ae_eq_univ
    simp only [ae_eq_univ]
    rw [(show (Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y})б¶ң = Prod.sndвҒ»В№' ({y}б¶ң) by rfl), вҶҗ map_apply measurable_snd (by simp)]
    simp [m]
  have h3' {x : ОІ} (hx : x вү  y) : (m x) ((Prod.sndвҒ»В№' {y}) вҲ© E) = 0 := by
    apply measure_inter_null_of_null_left E
    rw [вҶҗ Measure.map_apply measurable_snd (by simp), MeasureTheory.Measure.map_snd_prod]
    simp only [smul_apply, MeasurableSet.singleton, dirac_apply', smul_eq_mul, mul_eq_zero,
      indicator_apply_eq_zero, Pi.one_apply,
      one_ne_zero, imp_false]; right; exact hx
  simp only [coe_finset_sum, coe_smul, Finset.sum_apply, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, ОҪ]
  rw [Finset.sum_eq_single_of_mem y ?_]
  В· rw [h3, вҶҗ mul_assoc, ENNReal.inv_mul_cancel hy'', one_mul]
    finiteness
  В· intro _ _ hx
    rw [h3' hx]
    simp
  В· convert FiniteRange.range Y в–ё Set.preimage_singleton_nonempty.mp (nonempty_of_measure_ne_zero hy'')

В· let f : (Оұ Г— Оұ) Г— ОІ вҶ’ Оұ Г— Оұ := Prod.fst
  show ((m y).map f) = ((m y).map (Prod.fst вҲҳ f)).prod ((m y).map (Prod.snd вҲҳ f))
  have : IsProbabilityMeasure (m' y) := h5 hy''
  have : (m y).map f = (m' y).prod (m' y) := by simp [f, m]
  rw [вҶҗ map_map measurable_fst measurable_fst, вҶҗ map_map measurable_snd measurable_fst, this]
  simp

  _ вүӨ 6 * p.О· * k - (1 - 5 * p.О·) / (1 - p.О·) * (2 * p.О· * k - IвӮҒ) +
      p.О· / 6 * (8 * k + 2 * (2 * (k + (2 * p.О· * k - IвӮҒ) / (1 - p.О·)))) := by

context.enclosing_signature: (hAвӮҖ : A.Nonempty) (hA : (A + A).ncard вүӨ K * A.ncard) : вҲғ (H : Submodule (ZMod 2) G) (c : Set G), Nat.card c вүӨ K ^ (13/2 : в„қ) * A.ncard ^ (1/2 : в„қ) * (H : Set G).ncard ^ (-1/2 : в„қ) вҲ§ (H : Set G).ncard вүӨ K ^ 11 * A.ncard вҲ§ A.ncard вүӨ K ^ 11 * (H : Set G).ncard вҲ§ A вҠҶ c + H

thisвңқ : d[UA # UA] вүӨ log K
p : refPackage О©вӮҖ О©вӮҖ G := { XвӮҖвӮҒ := UA, XвӮҖвӮӮ := UA, hmeas1 := UAmeas, hmeas2 := UAmeas, О· := 1 / 9, hО· := вӢҜ, hО·' := вӢҜ }

idVA : IdentDistrib VA UA в„ҷ в„ҷ
idVH : IdentDistrib VH UH в„ҷ в„ҷ
this : d[VA # VH] вүӨ 11 / 2 * log K
Icard : |log вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A) - log вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH)| вүӨ 11 * log K
IAH : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A) вүӨ K ^ 11 * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH)
IHA : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) вүӨ K ^ 11 * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A)
I : log K * (-11 / 2) + log вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A) * (-1 / 2) + log вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) * (-1 / 2) вүӨ -H[VA - VH]
hвӮҖ : rexp (-H[VA - VH]) вүӨ в„ҷ.real ((VA - VH) вҒ»В№' {xвӮҖ})
J : K ^ (-11 / 2) * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A) ^ (1 / 2) * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) ^ (1 / 2) вүӨ вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘(A вҲ© (вҶ‘H + {xвӮҖ})))

simp only [Nat.card_eq_fintype_card, card_of_isEmpty, CharP.cast_eq_zero, lt_self_iff_false,
  not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.1 h'] at this

calc
  (Nat.card (A + A вҲ© (вҶ‘H + {xвӮҖ})) : в„қ)
  _ вүӨ Nat.card (A + A) := by
    gcongr; exact Nat.card_mono (toFinite _) <| add_subset_add_left inter_subset_left
  _ вүӨ K * Nat.card A := hA
  _ = (K ^ (13/2 : в„қ) * Nat.card A ^ (1/2 : в„қ) * Nat.card H ^ (-1/2 : в„қ)) *
      (K ^ (-11/2 : в„қ) * Nat.card A ^ (1/2 : в„қ) * Nat.card H ^ (1/2 : в„қ)) := by
    rpow_ring; norm_num
  _ вүӨ (K ^ (13/2 : в„қ) * Nat.card A ^ (1/2 : в„қ) * Nat.card H ^ (-1/2 : в„қ)) *
    Nat.card вҶ‘(A вҲ© (вҶ‘H + {xвӮҖ})) := by gcongr

context.enclosing_signature: {I : Type*} {iвӮҖ : I} {s : Finset I} (hs : В¬ iвӮҖ вҲҲ s) (hs' : Finset.Nonempty s) {Y : I вҶ’ О© вҶ’ G} [вҲҖ i, FiniteRange (Y i)] (hY : вҲҖ i, Measurable (Y i)) (h_indep : iIndepFun Y Ој) : d[Y iвӮҖ; Ој # вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, Y i; Ој] вүӨ 2 * вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, d[Y iвӮҖ; Ој # Y i; Ој]

ПҶ : I вҶ’ G вҶ’ G := fun i => if i = iвӮҖ then id else -id

d[Y iвӮҖ ; Ој # вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, Y i ; Ој] вүӨ
вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, (d[Y iвӮҖ ; Ој # Y i ; Ој] + 1 / 2 * (H[Y i ; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ ; Ој])) - 1 / 2 * (H[вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, Y i ; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ ; Ој])
ineq5 : вҲҖ j вҲҲ s, H[Y j ; Ој] вүӨ H[вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, Y i ; Ој]
ineq6 : (вҶ‘s.card)вҒ»В№ * вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, (H[Y i ; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ ; Ој]) вүӨ H[вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, Y i ; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ ; Ој]

calc
  _ вүӨ вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, (d[Y iвӮҖ; Ој # Y i; Ој] + 1/2 * (H[Y i; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ; Ој]))
      - 1/2 * (H[вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, Y i; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ; Ој]) := ineq4
  _ вүӨ вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, (d[Y iвӮҖ; Ој # Y i; Ој] + 1/2 * (H[Y i; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ; Ој]))
      - 1/2 * ((s.card : в„қ)вҒ»В№ * вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, (H[Y i; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ; Ој])) := by gcongr
  _ = вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, (d[Y iвӮҖ; Ој # Y i; Ој] + 1/2 * (H[Y i; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ; Ој])
      - 1/2 * ((s.card : в„қ)вҒ»В№ * (H[Y i; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ; Ој]))) := by
    rw [Finset.mul_sum, Finset.mul_sum, вҶҗ Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
  _ = вҲ‘ i вҲҲ s, (d[Y iвӮҖ; Ој # Y i; Ој] + (s.card - 1) / (2 * s.card) * (H[Y i; Ој] - H[Y iвӮҖ; Ој])) := by
    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i _ вҶҰ ?_
    rw [add_sub_assoc, вҶҗ mul_assoc, вҶҗ sub_mul]

query: coordinate projection from product measurable space is measurable

context.enclosing_signature: {m : в„•} {О© : Fin m вҶ’ Type*} (hО© : вҲҖ i, MeasureSpace (О© i)) (hО©prob : вҲҖ i, IsProbabilityMeasure (hО© i).volume) (X : вҲҖ i, О© i вҶ’ G) (ПҶ : Equiv.Perm (Fin m)) : D[fun i вҶҰ X (ПҶ i); fun i вҶҰ hО© (ПҶ i)] = D[X ; hО©]
context.goal: вҠў Measurable fun a => a i
hypotheses: О© : Fin m вҶ’ Type u_9
hО© : (i : Fin m) вҶ’ MeasureSpace (О© i)
hО©prob : вҲҖ (i : Fin m), IsProbabilityMeasure в„ҷ
X : (i : Fin m) вҶ’ О© i вҶ’ G
prior_tactics:
exact {
  aemeasurable_fst := by
    apply Measurable.aemeasurable
    apply Finset.measurable_sum
    intro i _
    exact measurable_pi_apply i
  aemeasurable_snd := by
    apply Measurable.aemeasurable
    apply Finset.measurable_sum
    intro i _
    exact measurable_pi_apply i
  map_eq := by
    let sum := fun x : Fin m вҶ’ G вҶҰ вҲ‘ i, x i
    let perm := MeasurableEquiv.piCongrLeft (fun _ вҶҰ G) ПҶ
    have perm_apply : вҲҖ (i : Fin m) (x : Fin m вҶ’ G), perm x i = x (ПҶ.symm i) := by
          intro i x
          simp only [perm]
          rw [MeasurableEquiv.coe_piCongrLeft, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply]
          simp only [eq_rec_constant]
    have invar : sum вҲҳ perm = sum := by
      ext x
      rw [comp_apply]
      convert Finset.sum_bijective ПҶ.symm (Equiv.bijective ПҶ.symm) ?_ ?_
      В· simp only [Finset.mem_univ, implies_true]
      intro i _
      rw [perm_apply i x]
    calc
      _ = Measure.map (sum вҲҳ perm) (Measure.pi fun i вҶҰ Measure.map (X (ПҶ i)) в„ҷ) := by rw [invar]
      _ = Measure.map sum (Measure.map perm (Measure.pi fun i вҶҰ Measure.map (X (ПҶ i)) в„ҷ)) := by
        rw [Measure.map_map]
        В· apply Finset.measurable_sum
          intro i _
          exact measurable_pi_apply i
        apply measurable_pi_lambda
        intro i
        have : (fun x : Fin m вҶ’ G вҶҰ perm x i) = (fun x : Fin m вҶ’ G вҶҰ x (ПҶ.symm i)) := by
          ext x
          exact perm_apply i x
        rw [this]
        exact measurable_pi_apply ((Equiv.symm ПҶ) i)
      _ = _ := by
        congr
        exact (MeasureTheory.measurePreserving_piCongrLeft (fun i вҶҰ Measure.map (X i) в„ҷ) ПҶ).map_eq
}

query: entropy equals when the measures are equal

context.enclosing_signature: {m : в„•} {О© : Fin m вҶ’ Type*} (hО© : вҲҖ i, MeasureSpace (О© i)) (hО©prob : вҲҖ i, IsProbabilityMeasure (hО© i).volume) (X : вҲҖ i, О© i вҶ’ G) (ПҶ : Equiv.Perm (Fin m)) : D[fun i вҶҰ X (ПҶ i); fun i вҶҰ hО© (ПҶ i)] = D[X ; hО©]
context.goal: вҠў H[fun x => вҲ‘ i, x i ; Measure.pi fun i => Measure.map (X (ПҶ i)) в„ҷ] = H[fun x => вҲ‘ i, x i ; Measure.pi fun i => Measure.map (X i) в„ҷ]
hypotheses: О© : Fin m вҶ’ Type u_9
hО© : (i : Fin m) вҶ’ MeasureSpace (О© i)
hО©prob : вҲҖ (i : Fin m), IsProbabilityMeasure в„ҷ
X : (i : Fin m) вҶ’ О© i вҶ’ G
prior_tactics:
В· apply IdentDistrib.entropy_congr
  exact {
    aemeasurable_fst := by
      apply Measurable.aemeasurable
      apply Finset.measurable_sum
      intro i _
      exact measurable_pi_apply i
    aemeasurable_snd := by
      apply Measurable.aemeasurable
      apply Finset.measurable_sum
      intro i _
      exact measurable_pi_apply i
    map_eq := by
      let sum := fun x : Fin m вҶ’ G вҶҰ вҲ‘ i, x i
      let perm := MeasurableEquiv.piCongrLeft (fun _ вҶҰ G) ПҶ
      have perm_apply : вҲҖ (i : Fin m) (x : Fin m вҶ’ G), perm x i = x (ПҶ.symm i) := by
            intro i x
            simp only [perm]
            rw [MeasurableEquiv.coe_piCongrLeft, Equiv.piCongrLeft_apply]
            simp only [eq_rec_constant]
      have invar : sum вҲҳ perm = sum := by
        ext x
        rw [comp_apply]
        convert Finset.sum_bijective ПҶ.symm (Equiv.bijective ПҶ.symm) ?_ ?_
        В· simp only [Finset.mem_univ, implies_true]
        intro i _
        rw [perm_apply i x]
      calc
        _ = Measure.map (sum вҲҳ perm) (Measure.pi fun i вҶҰ Measure.map (X (ПҶ i)) в„ҷ) := by rw [invar]
        _ = Measure.map sum (Measure.map perm (Measure.pi fun i вҶҰ Measure.map (X (ПҶ i)) в„ҷ)) := by
          rw [Measure.map_map]
          В· apply Finset.measurable_sum
            intro i _
            exact measurable_pi_apply i
          apply measurable_pi_lambda
          intro i
          have : (fun x : Fin m вҶ’ G вҶҰ perm x i) = (fun x : Fin m вҶ’ G вҶҰ x (ПҶ.symm i)) := by
            ext x
            exact perm_apply i x
          rw [this]
          exact measurable_pi_apply ((Equiv.symm ПҶ) i)
        _ = _ := by
          congr
          exact (MeasureTheory.measurePreserving_piCongrLeft (fun i вҶҰ Measure.map (X i) в„ҷ) ПҶ).map_eq
  }

  _ вүӨ p.О·вҒ»В№ * (D[fun _ вҶҰ p.XвӮҖ ; fun _ вҶҰ hО©вӮҖ] + p.О· * (p.m * d[p.XвӮҖ # p.XвӮҖ])) := by

context.goal: вҠў log вҶ‘(Nat.card { x // x вҲҲ A }) - log вҶ‘(sSup {x | вҲғ t, Nat.card вҶ‘(вҶ‘A вҲ© (t +бөҘ вҶ‘H)) = x}) вүӨ KL[U ; Ој # Prod.fst + Prod.snd ; Ој'.prod (uniformOn вҶ‘A)]

T : G Г— G вҶ’ G := Prod.fst
UA : G Г— G вҶ’ G := Prod.snd
xвңқ : MeasureSpace (G Г— G) := { toMeasurableSpace := Prod.instMeasurableSpace, volume := Ој'.prod (uniformOn вҶ‘A) }
KL[U ; Ој # T + UA ; в„ҷ] = вҲ‘ h вҲҲ H', 1 / вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) * log (1 / вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) / (Measure.map (T + UA) в„ҷ).real {h})
this : вҲ‘ h вҲҲ H', 1 / вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) = 1
IвӮӮ : -log ((Measure.map (T + UA) в„ҷ).real вҶ‘H') вүӨ KL[U ; Ој # T + UA ; в„ҷ]
prior_tactics:
have IвӮҒ : KL[U ; Ој # T + UA ; в„ҷ] =
    вҲ‘ h вҲҲ H', 1/Nat.card H * log ((1/Nat.card H) / (volume.map (T + UA)).real {h}) := by
  rw [KLDiv_eq_sum, вҶҗ Finset.sum_subset (Finset.subset_univ H')]; swap
  В· intro x _ hH
    rw [map_measureReal_apply hU (measurableSet_singleton x), hunif.measureReal_preimage_of_nmem]
    В· simp
    В· simpa [H'] using hH
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i hi вҶҰ ?_)
  rw [hunif'.measureReal_preimage_of_mem' hU hi]
  congr <;> simp [H']

have IвӮӮ : (вҲ‘ h вҲҲ H', 1/Nat.card H : в„қ) * log ((вҲ‘ h вҲҲ H', 1/Nat.card H : в„қ)
    / (вҲ‘ h вҲҲ H', (volume.map (T + UA)).real {h})) вүӨ KL[U ; Ој # T + UA ; в„ҷ] := by
  rw [IвӮҒ]
  apply Real.sum_mul_log_div_leq (by simp) (by simp) (fun i hi h'i вҶҰ ?_)
  simp [ENNReal.toReal_eq_zero_iff] at h'i
  have : (Measure.map U Ој).real {i} = 0 := by
    simp only [ne_eq, measure_ne_top, not_false_eq_true, measureReal_eq_zero_iff, H'] at h'i вҠў
    simp [habs i h'i]
  rw [hunif'.measureReal_preimage_of_mem' hU hi] at this
  simpa [H'] using this

have : (вҲ‘ h вҲҲ H', 1/Nat.card H : в„қ) = 1 := by
  simp only [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, вҶҗ mul_div_assoc, mul_one]
  rw [div_eq_one_iff_eq]
  В· simp [H', вҶҗ Nat.card_eq_card_finite_toFinset]
  В· simp [ne_of_gt]
simp only [sum_measureReal_singleton, one_div, log_inv] at IвӮӮ

      В· rw [вҶҗ Set.Nat.card_coe_set_eq (H':Set G), вҶҗ Set.Nat.card_coe_set_eq (K:Set G)]
        exact hK' вҹЁhH', hcardвҹ© hcard'

context.goal: вҠў вҲғ H', Nat.card вҶҘH' вүӨ Nat.card вҶ‘A вҲ§ Nat.card вҶ‘A < 2 * Nat.card вҶҘH' вҲ§ H' вүӨ H
hypotheses: hA : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘(A + A)) вүӨ K * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A)
hc : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘c) вүӨ K ^ 5 * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A) ^ (1 / 2) * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) ^ (-1 / 2)
IHA : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH) вүӨ K ^ 8 * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A)
IAH : вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶ‘A) вүӨ K ^ 8 * вҶ‘(Nat.card вҶҘH)
prior_tactics:
obtain вҹЁu, HH'u, huвҹ© :=
  H'.toAddSubgroup.exists_left_transversal_of_le (H := H.toAddSubgroup) H'H
refine вҹЁH', c + u, ?_, IH'A, by rwa [add_assoc, HH'u]вҹ©

calc
(Nat.card (c + u) : в„қ)
  вүӨ Nat.card c * Nat.card u := mod_cast natCard_add_le
_ вүӨ (K ^ 5 * Nat.card A ^ (1 / 2 : в„қ) * (Nat.card H ^ (-1 / 2 : в„қ)))
      * (Nat.card H / Nat.card H') := by
    gcongr
    apply le_of_eq
    rw [eq_div_iff H'_pos.ne']
    norm_cast
_ < (K ^ 5 * Nat.card A ^ (1 / 2 : в„қ) * (Nat.card H ^ (-1 / 2 : в„қ)))
      * (Nat.card H / (Nat.card A / 2)) := by
    gcongr
_ = 2 * K ^ 5 * Nat.card A ^ (-1 / 2 : в„қ) * Nat.card H ^ (1 / 2 : в„қ) := by
    field_simp
    simp_rw [вҶҗ rpow_natCast]
    rpow_ring
    norm_num
_ вүӨ 2 * K ^ 5 * Nat.card A ^ (-1 / 2 : в„қ) * (K ^ 8 * Nat.card A) ^ (1 / 2 : в„қ) := by
    gcongr
_ = 2 * K ^ 9 := by
    simp_rw [вҶҗ rpow_natCast]
    rpow_ring
    norm_num
have A_pos' : 0 < Nat.card A := mod_cast A_pos
